sglang.title: Optimize GDN decode for Qwen3 Next
sglang.author: samuellees
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
As MoE/FullAttn/GEMM has been optimized, the GDN kernel becomes a bottleneck for Q3N. For example, decode linear attention takes about 15~23% with cc=64/256 with ISL=1k in NVFP4 inference on B200.
This PR apply an optimize on GDN decode kernel, which brings significant benefits e2e.
Ref:

sglang.title: Reduce topk kernel shared memory from 128KB to 32KB for better occupancy
sglang.author: hammersam
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Fixes #16858
The radix-based topk CUDA kernel in sgl-kernel/csrc/elementwise/topk.cu was using 128KB of dynamic shared memory per thread block. This caused low GPU occupancy (~50%) because each SM could only run 1 block at a time due to shared memory constraints.
Changes
Reduced the dynam

sglang.author: hsuchifeng
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Summary

Fix OOM when loading DeepSeek models with streaming/remote weight loading
Defer dict(weights) call until quantization is actually needed
Return original weights iterator when no FP8 UE8M0 quantization is required

Problem
The _maybe_quant_weights_to_fp8_ue8m0 function unconditionally calls

sglang.title: [EPD][Perf] parallelize ZMQ send for encode server
sglang.author: ZhengWG
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
ZMQ socket operations (connect/send) were blocking the event loop, causing multiple send tasks to execute serially instead of in parallel. This resulted in gather_tasks time being the sum of all task times.
Modifications
Use thread pool executor to execute ZMQ socket creation, connection,

vllm.author: hmellor

vllm.author: fuscof-ibm
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
The original comment admitted uncertainty about why the +1 exists. Replace it with an accurate explanation: the extra slot stores the LogSumExp (LSE) value that are computed by the stage1 kernel and later used by the the stage2 kernel to merge the partial attention outputs across KV splits.

Purpose
Root cause: The Conch kernel expects unpacked zero points with shape (K//G, N), but vLLM was passing packed zeros with shape (N//pack, K//G). This caused out-of-bounds memory ac

Purpose
Allow inference of Mistral Large 3 on Blackwell with Flashinfer TRTLLM (latency) backend for better performance.

NOTE: this is a manually stacked PR, each commit is reviewed separately. For this PR, please only review the top commit: [Core] Add register_kernel decorator and global kernel registry
This PR adds a decorator helion.register_kernel() that registers a raw Python function containing Helion language i
